\tzpentry{ID4146}{Eigenvalue Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4146 introduces Eigenvalue Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\\\\\\\partial\\_t n \\= \\\\\\\\lambda \\- \\\\\\\\Gamma n \\+ D\\_n \\\\\\\\nabla^2 n.$$
